creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
The latest patches included into the knews port even

  patch-file.c   or perhaps   patch-resource.c

breaks the generating of the news headers when posting
an article!

Fix: 

Remove the two patches ;-) but this will open a security hole
if I remeber correctly.

Sorry, but due to selling my computer I have no time to solve
the problem myself.

Best regards

Lars
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to post or reply to a news artikle with knews.
